sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n12598" key="a)poqei/wsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀποθεί-ωσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>,<sense id="n12598.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fumigation,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0648.tlg001.perseus-grc1:10:28" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Onos.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.28</biblScope> </bibl>(pl.)</sense> </entryFree>
